title: Following Horses
body:
# Ensure your tamed Horses stay by your side!

Tamed mounts, including Horses, Zombie Horses,
Skeleton Horses, Camels, Donkeys, and Mules, will now follow their owner if they
are more than 8 blocks away, provided they have a saddle and are not leashed or
ridden by another player.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/e7KpFEYBKog" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**To get a horse to follow you it needs to be yours, tamed and have a saddle equipped.
It can also not have another rider, or be leashed.**

### Works on:
- Horses
- Zombie Horses
- Skeleton Horses
- Camels
- Donkeys
- Mules
